name: PluginSymbolVisiblityAttribute
summary: The PluginSymbolVisiblityAttribute class is used for defining the symbol visibility for model plug-ins. The attribute is initialized from the custom attribute [PluginSymbolVisiblity(PluginBase.SymbolVisibility Type)] in the plug-in source. If attribute is not defined or attribute has value PluginBase.SymbolVisibility.DRAW_SYMBOL plug-in symbol is drawn normally.

constructors.name: PluginSymbolVisiblityAttribute
constructors.summary: The custom attribute used to define coordinate system of the plug-in. This is not to be used by itself.

constructors.name: PluginSymbolVisiblityAttribute
constructors.summary: The custom attribute used to define coordinate system of the plug-in. This is not to be used by itself.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Returns the type of the input object dependency.
